failures.description: The Executor fabricated the answer by changing the tool-supported count from 2 to 9 and inventing record 0000000000 instead of reporting the two returned catalog items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to answer which available bagged Vacuum Cleaner items cost more than $591.59 using ProductCatalogSearch evidence. The tool result at index 3 clearly returned count=2 with item_ids 1345513440 and 2872451762, priced 655.59 and 622.12. At index 4, the Executor introduced unsupported information: "There are 9 options available, per record 0000000000." Neither the count 9 nor record 0000000000 appears in the user request, plan, or tool output. This fabricated/altered information was used as the final answer. The later Evaluator approval at index 5 did not correct the answer, so the failure remained unresolved.
